text.title: Code Review Cycle Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Code Review Cycle. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: ai-prescreen
step.action: Run AI lint + anti-pattern + test-coverage check.

step.name: merge-and-dedup
step.action: Unify lists; deduplicate; rank by severity.

step.name: human-on-block-and-writeback
step.action: Human resolves BLOCKs; novel patterns/mistakes written back.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
